creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
lang/erlang-runtime15 is specifically for databases/riak

There's no other reason for it to exist.  So bashio is causing 2 additional erlang ports (one for databases/riak and another for databases/riak2)

A question I will ask on riak2 is if it is suppose to be a new port or an update of an existing port.  If the latter, then one of these erlangs should be removed (or this should replace the 15 version)
